notes: v0.12.1 — hotfix: steam_api64.dll bundled with Windows build (v0.12.0 zip shipped without it, game refused to start). Same game otherwise: HUD overhaul, top-center profile bar with avatar + 4 stat tiles (K/D, WIN%, MATCHES, BEST) + currency chips (PULSE bolt, SURGE gem), HOME redesign with hero strip + 2x3 card grid (SHIP/NOW PLAYING/DAILY/STATS/NEWS/DISCORD), POP ART perf fix (baked tile, no more 5000 circles/frame), SKILLS locked placeholder, cursor max scale 4.0×. Windows only — mac/linux at Steam release.
